description: Tracks Anvo nightly Apollo prospecting pipeline progress.

stage2.note: Batch 16 Stage 3 work fully cleared 2026-04-29 Run #1. Batch 17 NOT started this run (at 21+ Apollo navigations, DOM degradation risk per cumulative-degradation learning).

pending_reveals.description: All batch16 work cleared this run. No pending reveals carried forward.

stage3.note: 2026-04-29 Run #1: Recovered 5 lost batch16 reveals (CRG/Lengyel, ERMAN/Roth, Hamtil/P.Hamtil, Mofilco/Schott, Cahills/T.Cahill) — emails preserved from prior session memory + Apollo. Revealed 8 new emails (St. Louis Auto Sprinkler/McCammack, Coonrod/Wolfington, Midwest V&C/Seabaugh, Scott Coop/Baker, Oliver Electric/J.Oliver, Higginbotham/Korn, Colcon/M.Walker, P&A Drywall/L.Swagman). Skipped Consolidated Construction (no DM, zero credits). Phase 2 phones: 10 captured (8 click-revealed: Hamtil/Schott/Cahill/Seabaugh/McCammack/Korn/Wolfington/Baker; 2 free visible: Lengyel/Roth).

stage4.remaining_to_score: Caught up — every REVEALED stage3 contact with email is scored. Awaiting next apollo-reveals batch.

credit_cycle.note: 2026-04-29 Run #1: 8 email reveals + 8 phone clicks. Phone credit estimate ~7/click (56 total). Apollo UI counter not re-checked at session end — estimated remaining ~1560. Cycle resets 2026-05-02 (2 days). Days-left tightened from 4 to 2 — accelerate further or accept some unused credits.

run_order_for_next_session: 1. Read state file + pipeline-learnings.json — focus on 2026-04-29 entries (data integrity recovery + Phase 2 phone burndown).
2. PRIORITY A: Stage 2 batch 17 (next 25 HIGH-scored from A2-stage1-tier1-scored.csv after rank index 500). Run from fresh-DOM session for max reveal headroom.
3. PRIORITY B: Stage 3 reveals on batch 17 REVEAL companies — same procedure as runbook Step 1.
4. PRIORITY C: Phase 2 phones on any batch 17 high-priority reveals (Owner/CEO/President at MO/KS).
5. PRIORITY D: Phone reveals on this run's leftover non-phone reveals (Oliver/J.Oliver, Colcon/M.Walker, P&A/L.Swagman) — only if cycle phase still allows.

6. KEY LEARNING 2026-04-29: Phase 1A retry of 7 DOM-broken contacts succeeded — fresh-DOM session reset the data-tour-id selectors. Confirms cumulative DOM degradation is per-session, not per-account.
7. KEY LEARNING 2026-04-29: At least 21 navigations completed before any persistent cells:0. Threshold may extend further than the 12-nav heuristic suggests — but the existing rule is still safe.

8. KEY LEARNING 2026-04-29: Sandbox bash clone of anvo-brain repeatedly timed out on git clone (45-60s timeouts; ssh authentication itself worked). Push fell back to Step 5.5 paste-block. Next run should test if cloning is faster.

9. CYCLE RESET REMINDER: Cycle resets on 2026-05-02 (3 days from 2026-04-29). If next run is on or after 2026-05-02 AND state.credit_cycle.cycle_start is still 2026-04-02, reset cycle_start to 2026-05-02 and zero spent counters per runbook Step 3.
